---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to a NuRec skill or workflow
title: "[FEA]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: 'daehyoungko'
---

## Affected skill or workflow

Identify the existing skill to extend, or explain where a new capability would
fit in the NuRec Skills routing model.

## Problem

Describe the user or developer problem. Include the current workflow and why it
is insufficient.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the skill behavior, instructions, helper, example, or integration you
would like to add.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any existing NuRec skill, upstream documentation, or workaround you
considered.

## Upstream dependencies

List any public container, model, dataset, repository, API, or release that this
request depends on.

## Acceptance criteria

Describe how maintainers could verify that the requested capability works.

## Additional context

Add public references, examples, or other context that may help evaluate the
request.
